message:
chore(lint): auto-fix formatting and remove unused imports (bd-3ae6)

- Fix indentation issues in E2E tests (navigation, dcg-workflow, agents, etc.)
- Remove unused imports: stat, join from update-checker.service.ts
- Remove unused variable isAllowed in dcg-workflow.spec.ts
- Fix unused function parameter in skeletons.test.tsx
- Various formatting fixes across gateway and web apps

Reduced lint errors from 282 to 264 (remaining are intentional patterns
like array index keys for static lists, semantic HTML suggestions for SVG
elements, and intentional dangerouslySetInnerHTML for text widgets).

Tests: 2218 pass, 11 skip, 0 fail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
